name: method
value: Central-difference speed rates from RATM high-speed windows are compared with the current racingQuad drag deceleration demand. This is not a wind-tunnel or passive coastdown drag fit: the windows are powered, aggressive maneuvers, and motor-thrust direction is not reconstructed here. Rows are intended to flag whether current drag magnitude is feasible beside observed high-speed kinematics.
